text.arabic: ((ذَهَبَ الظَّمَأُ وَابْتَلَّتِ العُرُوقُ، وَثَبَتَ الْأَجْرُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ)).
text.translated: (The thirst has gone and the veins are quenched, and reward is confirmed, if Allah wills.)

text.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ الَّتِي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي)).
text.arabicTranslated: (Allahumma inne as-aluka birahmatikal-latee wasiAAat kulla shay, an taghfira lee.)
text.translated: (O Allah, I ask You by Your mercy which envelopes all things, that You forgive me.)
